name: 05_metrics_single_contract_transport_dev_transport_sht_uvw_weather_north_sydney_hourly_rolling_30days
statement:
SELECT
  'contract' AS table_family,
  'transport_dev' AS catalog_name,
  'transport_sht' AS schema_name,
  'uvw_weather_north_sydney_hourly_rolling_30days' AS table_name,
  'VIEW' AS table_type,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count,
  COUNT(*) > 0 AS has_rows,
  GREATEST(MAX(try_cast(`date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`date_local` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`location_timezone` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`row_created_exec_id` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`row_updated_exec_id` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`row_updated_timestamp` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`row_created_timestamp` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS latest_observed_ts,
  LEAST(MIN(try_cast(`date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`date_local` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`location_timezone` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`row_created_exec_id` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`row_updated_exec_id` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`row_updated_timestamp` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`row_created_timestamp` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS earliest_observed_ts,
  'date|date_local|location_timezone|row_created_exec_id|row_updated_exec_id|row_updated_timestamp|row_created_timestamp' AS freshness_columns
FROM `transport_dev`.`transport_sht`.`uvw_weather_north_sydney_hourly_rolling_30days`
